tensura_fancymenu.placeholders.world.ten: Ability Active Preset §z[TR]§r

Returns the number of the currently active ability preset.
Returns an empty string when not in a world.
Ability Slot Cooldown §z[TR]§r

Returns the current cooldown of the current mode of the skill assigned to the selected ability slot.
Returns '0' when not in a world or no skill is assigned to that slot.
Ability Slot Current Learning §z[TR]§r

Returns the current learning points of the skill assigned to the selected ability slot.
Returns '0.0' when not in a world or no skill is assigned to that slot.
Ability Slot Current Learning Percent §z[TR]§r

Returns the current learning points of the skill assigned to the selected ability slot in percent.
Returns '0' when not in a world or no skill is assigned to that slot.
Possible Values: 0-100
Ability Slot Current Mastery §z[TR]§r

Returns the current mastery points of the skill assigned to the selected ability slot.
Returns '0.0' when not in a world, no skill is assigned to that slot or the skill has not yet been learned.
Ability Slot Current Mastery Percent §z[TR]§r

Returns the current mastery points of the skill assigned to the selected ability slot in percent.
Returns '0' when not in a world, no skill is assigned to that slot or the skill has not yet been learned.
Possible Values: 0-100
Ability Slot Max Learning §z[TR]§r

Returns the the amount of learning points required to learn the skill assigned to the selected ability slot.
Returns '0' when not in a world or no skill is assigned to that slot.
Ability Slot Max Mastery §z[TR]§r

Returns the amount of mastery points required to master the skill assigned to the selected ability slot.
Returns '0' when not in a world or no skill is assigned to that slot.
Ability Slot Mode Index §z[TR]§r

Returns the index of the current mode of the skill assigned to the selected ability slot.
Returns '0' when not in a world or no skill is assigned to that slot.
Ability Slot Mode Name §z[TR]§r

Returns the name of the current mode of the skill assigned to the selected ability slot.
Returns an empty string when not in a world or no skill is assigned to that slot.
Ability Slot Skill Icon §z[TR]§r

Returns the icon for the skill assigned to the selected ability slot as a Resource Location string.
Returns an empty string when not in a world or no skill is assigned to that slot.
Ability Slot Skill Name §z[TR]§r

Returns the name of the skill assigned to the selected ability slot.
Returns an empty string when not in a world or no skill is assigned to that slot.
Area Magicules §z[TR]§r

Returns the ambient magicule levels of the player's current area.
Returns '0.0' when not in a world.
Current Mount Spiritual Health §z[TR]§r

Returns the current spiritual health of the player's mount.
Returns '0.0' when not in a world or not riding an entity with health.
Current Mount Spiritual Health Percent §z[TR]§r

Returns the current spiritual health of the player's mount in percent.
Returns '0' when not in a world or not riding an entity with health.
Possible Values: 0-100
Current Player Aura §z[TR]§r

Returns the current aura of the player.
Returns '0.0' when not in a world.
Current Player Aura Percent §z[TR]§r

Returns the current aura of the player in percent.
Returns '0' when not in a world.
Possible Values: 0-100
Current Player Evolution Progress Percent §z[TR]§r

Returns the current progress toward the player's currently tracked evolution in percent.
Returns '0' when not in a world or the player does not have a next evolution selected for tracking.
Possible Values: 0-100
Current Player Existence §z[TR]§r

Returns the current existence of the player.
Returns '0.0' when not in a world.
Current Player Existence Percent §z[TR]§r

Returns the current existence of the player in percent.
Returns '0' when not in a world.
Possible Values: 0-100
Current Player Magicules §z[TR]§r

Returns the current magicules of the player.
Returns '0.0' when not in a world.
Current Player Magicules Percent §z[TR]§r

Returns the current magicules of the player in percent.
Returns '0' when not in a world.
Possible Values: 0-100
Current Player Severance §z[TR]§r

Returns the current health severance of the player.
Returns '0.0' when not in a world.
Current Player Severance Percent §z[TR]§r

Returns the current health severance of the player in percent.
Returns '0' when not in a world.
Possible Values: 0-100
Current Player Spiritual Health §z[TR]§r

Returns the current spiritual health of the player.
Returns '0.0' when not in a world.
Current Player Spiritual Health Percent §z[TR]§r

Returns the current spiritual health of the player in percent.
Returns '0' when not in a world.
Possible Values: 0-100
Max Mount Spiritual Health §z[TR]§r

Returns the max spiritual health of the player's mount.
Returns '0.0' when not in a world or not riding an entity with health.
Max Player Aura §z[TR]§r

Returns the max aura of the player.
Returns '0.0' when not in a world.
Max Player Existence §z[TR]§r

Returns the max existence of the player.
Returns '0.0' when not in a world.
Max Player Magicules §z[TR]§r

Returns the max magicules of the player.
Returns '0.0' when not in a world.
Max Player Spiritual Health §z[TR]§r

Returns the max spiritual health of the player.
Returns '0.0' when not in a world.
Player Alignment §z[TR]§r

Returns the current alignment of the player.
Returns an empty string when not in a world.
Player Analysis Mode §z[TR]§r

Returns the player's current level of Analysis.
Returns '0' when not in a world.
Player Dodge Cooldown §z[TR]§r

Returns the player's current dodge cooldown.
Returns '0' when not in a world.
Player Magicule Poison Resistance §z[TR]§r

Returns the player's current level of magicule poison resistance.
Returns '0' when not in a world.
Player Multilayer Barrier §z[TR]§r

Returns the player's current amount of multilayer barrier.
Returns '0.0' when not in a world.
Player Presence Sense §z[TR]§r

Returns the player's current level of Presence Sense.
Returns '0' when not in a world.
Player Race Name §z[TR]§r

Returns the name of the player's current race.
Returns an empty string when not in a world or the player does not currently have a race selected.
Player Soul Points §z[TR]§r

Returns the current soul points of the player.
Returns '0' when not in a world.
Ability Slot Current Mastery Percent §z[TR]§r

Returns the name of the player's currently tracked evolution.
Returns an empty string when not in a world or the player does not have a next evolution selected for tracking.
tensura_fancymenu.requirements.world.ten:
Returns true if there is a skill assigned to the selected ability slot.
Returns false when not in a world.

Returns true if the skill assigned to the selected ability slot has been fully learned.
Returns false when not in a world or no skill is assigned to that slot.

Returns true if the skill assigned to the selected ability slot has been fully mastered.
Returns false when not in a world, no skill is assigned to that slot or the skill has not yet been learned.

Returns true if the skill assigned to the selected ability slot, in its current mode, is currently on cooldown.
Returns false when not in a world or no skill is assigned to that slot.

Returns true if the player has a Demon Lord Seed.
Returns false when not in a world.

Returns true if the player has a Hero Egg.
Returns false when not in a world.

Returns true if the player is currently in Spiritual Form.
Returns false when not in a world.

Returns true if the player has awoken as a True Demon Lord.
Returns false when not in a world.

Returns true if the player has awoken as a True Hero.
Returns false when not in a world.
